blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of multi-page forms with progress saving.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-page forms with progress saving. While the linked use case mentions that a patient can complete 80% of the intake form and return later, it does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation of multi-page functionality or the specific mechanism for saving progress. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not confirm that the system supports multi-page forms as required.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of multi-page forms with progress saving.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of multi-page forms with progress saving.
